sources.excerpt: Antonelli's Pizza & Subs is a family-owned restaurant at 8212 Gunston Corner Lane, Lorton, VA 22079; the official site links the current HTML menu and printable PDF.
notes: Used for current restaurant identity, location, and the owner-controlled link to the menu surface.

sources.excerpt: The current owner-published menu contains 97 price-list rows plus responsive Plain Cheese tables. Reviewed structure yields 80 top-level food and nonalcoholic-beverage products across 15 categories after excluding helper rows, modifiers, promotions, and Beer & Wine.
notes: The page publishes product names and selected ingredient descriptions but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure.
The HTML contains two responsive Plain Cheese tables. The stale row prices medium pizza at $12.99; the current row prices it at $13.99, matching the linked PDF.
Optional additions are source context only and are removed before base-product allergen mapping.

sources.excerpt: Two-page landscape Antonelli's Pizza & Subs menu, created August 25, 2025 and labeled corrected 06/25, publishing current sections from Starters & Sides through Beverages and Beer & Wine.
rowIdentifiers: PRICES & MENU ITEMS SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT NOTICE — CORRECT ANY ERRORS 06/25
notes: Both pages were rendered at original detail and visually inspected; the PDF's multi-column reading order was not trusted without that visual review.
The PDF corroborates all 80 selected top-level products and the current $13.99 medium Plain Cheese price.
Twelve Beer & Wine presentations were deliberately excluded from the food and nonalcoholic-beverage catalog.
